channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19683] interop sanity-quota test_1h: FAIL: Write success, expect EDQUOT
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9e30e49f-4fa3-4cb8-8345-8b4b8ace9fbe

test_1h failed with the following error:

running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups: 60000
 [fallocate] [-l13MiB] [/mnt/lustre/d1h.sanity-quota/f1h.sanity-quota-0]
Disk quotas for usr quota_usr (uid 60000):
     Filesystem  kbytes  bquota  blimit  bgrace   files  iquota  ilimit  igrace 
    /mnt/lustre  13312*       0   10240       -      1*       0       0       - 
 lustre-MDT0000       0       -       0       -       1       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0000  13312*       -   13312       -      1*       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0001       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0002       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0003       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0004       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0005       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
 lustre-OST0006       0       -       0       -       0       -       0       - 
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 13312
Files for user (quota_usr), count=1:
  File: /mnt/lustre/d1h.sanity-quota/f1h.sanity-quota-0
  Size: 13631488  	Blocks: 26624      IO Block: 4194304 regular file
Device: 1273,181606	Inode: 144117956752703522  Links: 1
Access: (0644/-rw-r--r--)  Uid: (60000/quota_usr)   Gid: (60000/quota_usr)
Access: 2025-12-05 00:06:50.000000000 +0000
Modify: 2025-12-05 00:06:50.000000000 +0000
Change: 2025-12-05 00:06:50.000000000 +0000
 Birth: 2025-12-05 00:06:50.000000000 +0000
 sanity-quota test_1h: @@@@@@ FAIL: Write success, expect EDQUOT 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7317:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:156:quota_error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:1161:test_1h()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7693:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7756:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7571:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh:1205:main()

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4681 - 6.12.0-124.13.1.el10_1.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/117 - 4.18.0-553.82.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-quota test_1h - Write success, expect EDQUOT
item.summary: interop sanity-quota test_1h: FAIL: Write success, expect EDQUOT

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
